verdict.summary: The change correctly makes literal success the only green completed gate conclusion, routes every documented GitHub non-success conclusion through the existing ci-fix failure path, and fails closed to unknown for malformed or unrecognized values (including unhashable hostile input). The added self-tests are non-vacuous and cover all newly classified conclusions plus malformed/unrecognized cases that previously became success or could crash. No trust check, audit binding, permission boundary, or untrusted-text execution surface is weakened.
